_meta.role: 可愛短髮小女童；Kenneth/Nan 之高徒（最有前途）；父母經營藍野豬酒館；持有慈悲符文。三歲起學作吟遊詩人，最愛大鍵琴。需先報名後再對話；對玩家試煉感興趣，會主動把符文交給玩家（須先得父母同意）。

translations.en: Ariana
translations.note: 人名；len=6 限制下取『艾莉安娜』前三字；@aria keyword 用此前綴可命中

translations.en: a cute little girl with short hair.
translations.zh: 一名可愛的短髮小女童。

translations.en: "My parents told me never to talk to strangers. What's your name?"
translations.zh: 「父母教我不可與生客交談。汝姓甚名誰？」
translations.note: 小孩首遇玩家警戒詢問

translations.en: "Ok. Now I can talk to you!"
translations.note: 原 len=28 緊；省去『現』『如今』

translations.en: "Oh, hello again."
name
She curtsies gracefully. "Ariana is my name."
translations.zh: 她優雅地行了個禮。「我叫艾莉安娜。」
translations.note: 小女孩自我介紹；curtsy 行屈膝禮

translations.en: job
"I'm learning to be a @bard. I like to @play the harpsichord best."
translations.zh: 「我在學作@bard（吟遊詩人）詩人。我最愛@play（彈大）鍵琴。」

translations.en: bard
translations.note: @bard keyword 前綴（玩家輸入『吟遊』可命中）

translations.en: "I want to be a bard when I grow up. They have more @fun than anybody!"
translations.zh: 「我長大要當吟遊詩人。他們可比誰都@fun（快活）！」

translations.en: comp
"They taught me all about compassion. They say it's very important for bards."
translations.zh: 「他們教我慈悲之道。聽說此事於詩人尤為要緊。」

translations.en: mant
"I can't remember it now... And @Kenneth just taught it to me last week..."
translations.zh: 「我此刻記不起來……@Kenneth（肯尼）斯上週才教過我……」

translations.en: "Wait, I know! It's 'mo!'"
translations.note: len=26 緊；mo 保留 ASCII（真言音節系統）

translations.en: "Or maybe it was 'om'... Or 'mu,' or 'um'... It was something like that."
translations.note: 保留 mu/om/um ASCII；mu 真實是慈悲真言（Mariah 系統）

translations.en: rune
song,music,play,harp
translations.note: keyword 群組；對應四個關鍵字

translations.en: fun
translations.note: @fun keyword；len=3 用單字『樂』（快活之意）

translations.en: "Oh yes, lots of it!"
ken
"He's my teacher."
bye
"See you later."
"What do you mean?"
"I've been studying to be a bard since I was this many." She holds up three fingers.
translations.zh: 「我自三歲起便學作吟遊詩人。」她舉起三根手指。
translations.note: 三根手指=三歲，譯文直接點明

translations.en: "I'd like to play something for you, but I'm not good enough yet."
translations.zh: 「我本想為汝奏一曲，無奈尚不夠熟練。」

translations.en: She looks away for a moment, then turns back to you, blushing slightly.
translations.zh: 她別過頭去片刻，回望時雙頰微紅。

translations.en: "Will you come back to hear my music when I am older, if you can?"
translations.zh: 「待我長大後，汝若得空，可否再來聽我奏樂？」
translations.note: trailing space 在原文，譯文以句號收

translations.en: yn
The little girl sniffles, seeming suddenly on the verge of tears.
translations.zh: 小女童抽了抽鼻子，眼眶頓時泛紅，似將哭泣。

translations.en: *"I'm sorry," she says, "I shouldn't have asked." She turns her back, as if ashamed to face you.
translations.zh: *「對不起，」她說，「不該問此事。」她轉過身去，似羞於再面對汝。

translations.en: The little girl's face breaks out into a smile bright enough to light up the whole room.
translations.zh: 小女童綻開笑容，明亮得能照亮整間屋子。

translations.en: "Really? I would like that very much."
"I already gave it to you, silly. I hope you can figure out how to use it."
translations.zh: 「我早已給了汝呀，傻氣。但願汝懂得如何用它。」
translations.note: 回頭找她要符文時的回答（已給過）

translations.en: "I have the Rune of Compassion. Isn't it pretty?" She reaches into her pocket and takes it out to show you.*
translations.zh: 「我有@慈悲@符文。漂不漂亮？」她自口袋取出，展示給汝看。*

translations.en: "Do you need it for something?"
yn
"Ok."
"Are you on an important quest?"
translations.note: quest → 試煉（與 glossary 一致）

translations.en: yn
"I'd best hold onto it then. I was told to look after it carefully."
translations.zh: 「那我還是收好為妙。長輩交代要好好看顧。」
translations.note: 非要緊試煉的話拒絕交出

translations.en: "I'm not supposed to let anyone else have it. But if you truly need it..."
translations.zh: 「我本不該交給旁人。但若汝當真需要……」

translations.en: "I don't know what I should do."
"I know! My parents run the Blue Boar Tavern. Go ask them if you can borrow the rune."
translations.zh: 「我知道了！我父母在「藍野豬」酒館。汝去問可否借走符文。」
translations.note: Blue Boar Tavern → 藍野豬酒館（新詞，回寫 glossary）

translations.en: "If they say 'tis okay, I'll give it to you."
"Hi! Did you get permission from my parents to borrow the rune?"
translations.zh: 「嗨！我父母可允汝借符文了嗎？」

translations.en: yn
"Oh, you're carrying too much right now. You'd better come back for it later."
translations.zh: 「噢，汝身上拿太多東西了。日後再來取吧。」

translations.en: "Then here you are." She hands you the rune. "I wish you the best of luck on your quest."
translations.zh: 「那就交給汝。」她把符文遞給汝。「祝汝@試煉一路順遂。」

translations.en: "Well, if you get their permission later, let me know."
translations.zh: 「好，日後若得他們應允，再來告訴我。」

people.Ariana's parents: 艾莉安娜之雙親（藍野豬酒館主）

riddles_additions.en: "Wait, I know! It's 'mo!'" / "Or maybe it was 'om'... Or 'mu,' or 'um'..."
riddles_additions.zh: 「等等，是「mo」！」／「莫非是om……或mu，或um……反正類似那樣。」
riddles_additions.ref: Ariana 為小孩記不清慈悲真言 mu；mo/om/mu/um 全部保留 ASCII（與 Mariah/Nan 系統一致）。真實答案是 mu。
riddles_additions.strategy: 音節 ASCII 保留；童言童語『反正類似那樣』體現孩童特性

translator_notes: Ariana 三歲小女童語氣，純真但仍有禮（『汝』『可否』『莫非』）。是 Nan/Kenneth 之高徒（對照 011_Kenneth/012_Nan：『young @Ariana』『最有前途之高徒』），人名統一『艾莉安娜』，display name 因 len=6 取『艾莉安』前三字（@aria keyword 仍可命中前綴）。父母經營藍野豬酒館 Blue Boar Tavern（新詞回寫）。慈悲符文 Rune of Compassion 是主線收集物之一；玩家需向其父母申請借符文。避用『淚』（5C trail）改『哭泣』；避用『許』改『莫非／應允』。
